name: Gami Discord Recruitment
description: Browser-based Discord DM handler for Gami gaming platform. Each bot node runs a standalone node-worker process that connects to the local Chrome CDP. The plugin routes tool calls to the correct node worker via HTTP — no direct CDP access required from the gateway.

workerUrl.description: Default node-worker URL for single-bot mode or fallback. Default: http://127.0.0.1:3000

bots.description: Multi-bot definitions. If omitted, runs in single-bot mode using the global workerUrl above.

id.description: Unique bot identifier used in tool calls and logs.

label.description: Human-readable bot name shown in logs.

workerUrl.description: HTTP URL of the node-worker running on this bot's machine. e.g. http://192.168.8.101:3000

workerUrl.label: Node Worker URL (single-bot)
workerUrl.description: URL of the node-worker process running on the same machine as Chrome.
